description: Mux provides infrastructure for online video, including video upload, encoding, streaming, live streaming, playback, and video analytics. Its platform is used by developers to manage video assets and measure playback performance.
summary: Mux exposes a REST API at `https://api.mux.com`, a hosted MCP server at `https://mcp.mux.com`, and the `mux` CLI; the API and CLI use Mux access tokens, while the hosted MCP server uses Mux Dashboard OAuth authorization.
